def build_report(events: list[dict]) -> str:
    parts = []
    for event in events:
        parts.append(f"[{event['timestamp']}] {event['message']}")
    return "\n".join(parts) + "\n"


def collect_all_ids(groups: list[list[dict]]) -> list[int]:
    all_ids = []
    for group in groups:
        all_ids.extend(item["id"] for item in group)
    return all_ids


def merge_results(chunks: list[list[str]]) -> list[str]:
    merged = []
    for chunk in chunks:
        merged.extend(chunk)
    return merged


def build_sql_where(filters: dict) -> str:
    parts = []
    for key, value in filters.items():
        parts.append(f"{key} = '{value}'")
    if parts:
        return " WHERE " + " AND ".join(parts)
    return ""
